title: Total Rewards Strategy Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Total Rewards Strategy skill.

problem_statement.description: The specific rewards challenge (e.g., stopping high turnover in critical roles, or unifying benefits post-merger).

company_context.description: Overview of the organization, employee demographics, and its business model.

employee_value_proposition.description: The organization's overarching Employee Value Proposition (EVP).

strategic_talent_goals.description: The specific behavioral and retention goals required by the business strategy.

current_rewards_spend.description: Summary of current compensation and benefits spend or specific budget constraints.

employee_demographics_feedback.description: Data indicating current dissatisfaction, flight risks, or desired benefits from employees.

benchmarking_data.description: Optional industry benchmarking data for compensation across relevant talent pools.

known_constraints.description: Optional constraints such as strict cash preservation requiring equity-heavy rewards.
